title: Hornet Removal in Pleasantville, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Pleasantville, Westchester. Safe nest elimination $350-$550. Licensed experts serving residential & commercial properties. Call now!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to homeowners and businesses throughout Pleasantville, NY, especially during the warmer months when these aggressive stinging insects build nests in eaves, trees, and attics. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, effective hornet removal services to protect your family, employees, and customers from painful stings and potential allergic reactions. Our experienced technicians serve all of Pleasantville with prompt, professional hornet nest elimination at competitive rates.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Westchester County communities like Pleasantville with specialized hornet removal services. Our licensed technicians use proven methods and professional-grade equipment to safely remove hornet nests from any location, backed by our satisfaction guarantee and comprehensive insurance coverage for your peace of mind.
localContext: Pleasantville's tree-lined neighborhoods, historic homes near Memorial Plaza, and properties surrounding Lake Marie provide ideal nesting spots for hornets in attics, porches, and mature trees. Our team is familiar with the unique architecture of Pleasantville residences and the commercial buildings along Wheeler Avenue and Bedford Road, ensuring efficient hornet removal regardless of your property type.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Pleasantville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Pleasantville depending on availability. During peak season (late summer), we prioritize emergency calls involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours of arrival.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest elimination using professional equipment and protective gear, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and nest removal/disposal. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide free estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Pleasantville?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during hornet removal. We recommend keeping family members and pets indoors during the treatment process, and the area is typically safe within 2-4 hours after service completion. We provide specific safety instructions tailored to your situation.

faqs.question: Do you handle hornet nests in hard-to-reach areas like high trees or attics?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in removing hornet nests from challenging locations including tall trees, attic spaces, wall voids, and second-story eaves. Our technicians have the proper ladders, extension equipment, and safety gear to access nests up to 30 feet high, which is common in Pleasantville's mature residential properties.
